20.reason: // Accessing s[i - 1] when i = 0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior)

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Accessing s[i - 1] when i = 0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior)

26.reason: // When i = 0, s[i - 1] is invalid; when i = strlen(s)-1, s[i+1] is '\0', causing invalid comparison

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // When i = 0, s[i - 1] is invalid; when i = strlen(s)-1, s[i+1] is '\0', causing invalid comparison

28.reason: // Prints the previous character again, causing duplication (e.g., "a-d" becomes "aabcd" instead of "abcd")

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Prints the previous character again, causing duplication (e.g., "a-d" becomes "aabcd" instead of "abcd")

33.reason: // Prints the next character again, causing duplication (e.g., "a-d" becomes "abcdd" instead of "abcd")

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Prints the next character again, causing duplication (e.g., "a-d" becomes "abcdd" instead of "abcd")

37.reason: // Same out-of-bounds risk when i = 0; also duplicates characters around '-' unnecessarily

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Same out-of-bounds risk when i = 0; also duplicates characters around '-' unnecessarily

39.reason: // When i is last index, s[i+1] is '\0', printing null character or causing undefined behavior
